title: Sixteen Again
excerpt: We're thrilled to be have our handmade fabric minibook featured in the latest issue of Mollie Makes . We were asked to use bright, rainbow colors for the Summer of Love issue. The friendship bracelets and colorful projects make me…
body: We're thrilled to be have our handmade fabric minibook featured in the latest issue of Mollie Makes. We were asked to use bright, rainbow colors for the Summer of Love issue. The friendship bracelets and colorful projects make me feel like I'm a teenager again. How wonderful it would have been to have had such a gorgeous magazine way back when. Thankful it's available now though - UK stockists should have Issue 16 today and there's also a downloadable iPad version available.Mollie Makes is published thirteen times a year. We curate the best craft from around the world into a tactile, collectable and totally irresistible magazine. We love to make – handmade is more than just a hobby for us, it’s in everything we do. We can’t resist hunting down treasures in thrift stores, then customising, re-covering and embellishing our finds with our endless stash of ribbons, buttons, fabrics and felt. We’re forever on the lookout for new inspiration. Whatever we do, we’re living and loving handmade.
